system: You are a precise tab categorization assistant.
user: Classify each tab by what it is ABOUT. The title is the strongest signal; the domain is secondary context. Tabs marked {{titleOnlyMarker}} are on aggregator sites (search engines, social media, AI chats, streaming) where the domain says nothing about the content — judge those purely by the title (e.g. a search for flights is Travel, an AI chat about investing is Finance).
For each tab, pick the single best category. If one of that category's subcategories clearly fits, set it; otherwise set subcategory to null. Only use subcategories listed under the chosen category.
